== Notes for [[Item:Q113819|Q113819]] ==

==Major Afonso de Cambra==

* Major Afonso de Cambra married twice, the first with Martim Pires Correia and the second with Fernão Gonçalves Chancino

==Sources==

* Wikipedia- https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Afonso_Anes_de_Cambra

* Historia genealogica da Casa Real Portugueza - https://books.google.com.pe/books?id=WhRcAAAAcAAJ&pg=PA151&lpg=PA151&dq=Senhorinha+Fernandes+de+Chacim&source=bl&ots=zTS6dd0c3f&sig=BAE-eUCLl9OxtSQVHnyK6tsOGaY&hl=en&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjit9PBmLzeAhWkzVkKHQtwBfs4ChDoATAAegQIBBAB#v=onepage&q=Senhorinha%20Fernandes%20de%20Chacim&f=false
* Provas da historia genealogica da casa real portugueza, tiradas -

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
